svg.text: the ONLY method — visitors do the rest
immutable ⇒ thread-safe, shareable, natural cache key ✓
no toSql() here — the model knows ZERO backends (that's the whole point)
values NEVER in SQL · identifiers whitelisted
tables: ConcurrentHashMap · stateless per request · count BEFORE paginate, project LAST

g.text: ✓ arity fails fast in the ctor

svg.text: ① fluent builder → ② immutable AST (Composite) → ③ visitor seam (double dispatch) → ④ one backend per visitor → ⑤ execution pipeline + wire envelope

g.text: Patterns: Composite · Builder · Visitor · Strategy · Interpreter · Facade
Query DSL / database query abstraction API — machine-coding LLD
